title: New DeFi Entrant Widens Field of Crypto Political Campaign Funds as Elections Loom
summary: The Defend Developers PAC is a new political action committee focused on supporting lawmakers who advocate for protecting crypto developers from legal vulnerabilities. This move comes as elections approach, highlighting the growing influence of crypto in politics.
body:
A new political action committee (PAC) called the Defend Developers PAC has emerged, aiming to contribute to lawmakers who seek to shield crypto developers from legal vulnerabilities. The PAC is part of a broader trend of crypto-related political spending as elections loom, emphasizing the industry's increasing involvement in shaping policy.

The Defend Developers PAC specifically targets lawmakers who advocate for policies that protect crypto developers from legal risks. This initiative comes at a critical time, as the crypto industry faces heightened regulatory scrutiny and potential legal challenges. The PAC's focus on developers highlights the need for clear legal frameworks to support innovation in the crypto space.

For everyday people, this development underscores the growing intersection of crypto and politics. As the industry continues to evolve, the policies that lawmakers enact will have significant implications for users, developers, and investors. The Defend Developers PAC's efforts could influence future legislation, potentially creating a more favorable environment for crypto innovation.

As elections approach, watch for increased political activity from crypto-related PACs. The Defend Developers PAC's actions could set a precedent for how the industry engages with lawmakers to shape policy. Stay informed about upcoming elections and the positions of candidates on crypto-related issues to understand how these developments might affect the broader crypto landscape.
twitterThread: A new PAC is backing lawmakers who want to protect crypto developers from legal risks. Elections are coming, and crypto's political influence is growing.
The Defend Developers PAC aims to support policies that shield crypto developers from legal vulnerabilities. This is part of a broader trend of crypto-related political spending.

As elections approach, watch for more crypto PACs to influence policy. Stay informed about candidates' stances on crypto. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-03-new-defi-pac-aims-to-shield-crypto-developers-from-legal-risks
